base_prompt: Pixel-art sprite of objects — a pickup_item (health_pickup) from 1991 sonic the hedgehog. Rings + monitors (1UP/Power Sneakers/Invincibility/Shield) + springs (red/yellow) + item containers + animal capsule. Centered on magenta (#FF00FF) background, 8-bit or 16-bit pixel-art aesthetic, no anti-aliasing, chunky pixels. Single canonical pose (frame 0 of animation).
source_progression_description: Rings + monitors (1UP/Power Sneakers/Invincibility/Shield) + springs (red/yellow) + item containers + animal capsule
